site.title: Intenesenel Task Fos Bilong Helpim Ol Man Long Kisim Tok
site.tagline: Ol man i mas i gat rot long baim ol samting long ol narapela kantri
nav.label: Nambawan
nav.transparency: Pasin bilong kamapim ol samting long ples klia
hero.home.eyebrow: Yu Inap Kisim Ol Tok i Kam Long Open Source
hero.projects.eyebrow: Ol buk i gat nem bilong ol man i stap long en
hero.transparency.eyebrow: Ol buk na nius bilong ol man
meta.home.description: IATF i tanim ol samting ol man i mas save long en i kamap olsem open source.
meta.projects.description: Lukim ol projek bilong helpim ol man long ritim ol buk na nius em IATF i wokim.
meta.propose.description: Askim wanpela projek long IATF long rot bilong web, email, o Discord.
meta.governance.description: Ritim olsem wanem IATF i save orait long ol projek, lukautim ol buk, na putim ol wok long ples klia.
meta.join.description: Ol rot bilong insait long IATF: givim kod, trensletim, traim, o lukautim wanpela projek.
meta.accessibility.description: Olsem wanem IATF i laik bai ol man i ken i go long dispela web-sait, na olsem wanem ol i ken ripot long ol samting i pasim rot bilong ol man long go long en?
meta.transparency.description: Ol rait bilong IATF i stap long ol man i ken lukim: ol disisen, ol projek, na ol senis i kamap long ol samting ol i mekim, ol i save stap long ai bilong ol man.
registry.empty.title: I no gat wanpela projek i kamap yet
registry.empty.body: IATF i redim namba wan projek bilong em.
proposal.form.title: salim wanpela askim
proposal.form.body: Fimim fom i stap daunbilo bilong salim askim i go long IATF.
proposal.form.noscript: JavaScript i mas i stap bilong yusim dispela web fom. Sapos em i no stap, yusim email o Discord.
proposal.form.runtimeUnavailable: Live submission i no stap long dispela environment. Dispela form bai opim email klient bilong yu.
proposal.form.loadingProtection: Mi redim rot bilong salim ol samting i go...
proposal.form.ready: Taim yu salim askim bilong yu, IATF bai kamapim wanpela rekot bilong ol samting yu kisim.
proposal.form.turnstileRequired: Plis stretim ol samting bilong lukautim spam paslain long yu salim.
proposal.form.turnstileExpired: Wok bilong lukautim spam i pinis. Plis sekim gen paslain long yu salim.
proposal.form.turnstileError: I no gat rot bilong sekim spam long nau. Plis traim gen.
proposal.form.turnstileTimeout: Taim bilong banisim spam i pinis. Plis traim sekim gen.
proposal.form.requiredMessage: Pasim ol tok i stap long dispela pes paslain long yu salim.
proposal.form.success: Mipela i kisim pinis askim bilong yu na putim i stap bilong skelim.
proposal.form.successFollowUp: Sapos yu toktok gen wantaim IATF long dispela askim, yu mas raitim nem bilong ol lain i stap daunbilo.
proposal.form.successRecordLabel: Rekot bilong ol samting ol i kisim
proposal.form.errorGeneric: Samting i no wok gut taim yu salim askim. Plis traim gen. Sapos dispela hevi i stap yet, yusim email.
proposal.field.optional: I no gat wok long mekim
proposal.field.conditional: Ol i gat sampela samting ol i mas mekim
project.detail.eyebrow: Ol manmeri i ken insait long projek
project.detail.problemTitle: Dispela projek i stretim wanem hevi?
project.detail.whyTitle: As na ol i kamapim dispela projek
project.detail.scopeOutTitle: I no insait long wok bilong em
project.detail.defaultLanguageNotes: Baibel long tok Inglis, na bihain ol bai tanim tok bilong en
footer.label: Footer bilong sait
footer.blurb: Em i no hatwok long kirapim ol wok bilong helpim ol man long kisim save long ol tok bilong Baibel, na em i isi long kamapim ol tok, na i isi moa long ol man i ken ritim ol dispela tok.
footer.source: Ol lo bilong helpim ol man long i go long ol narapela hap: [W3C WAI](https://www.w3.org/WAI/)Ol man i save yusim ol samting bilong helpim ol man long kisim save long ol samting ol i mekim.
contact.label: Kontek
translation.label: Stat bilong trenslesen
translation.source: Tok Inglis em i nambawan tokples bilong dispela pes.
translation.humanReviewed: Wanpela man i save gut long mekim tok, em i bin skelim dispela Baibel.
translation.machineAssisted: Dispela trenslesen em masin i helpim na i no gat wanpela man i save gut long tokples i bin skelim gut yet.
translation.needsUpdate: Ol i bin stretim dispela Baibel paslain long ol i stretim ol tok bilong en long tok Inglis, olsem na ating ol i mas stretim gen.
translation.report: Ripotim wanpela hevi bilong trenslesen: {{contact.i18nEmail}}Ol i no save mekim olsem.
